name: Hana
description:
**ANYPOV:** *You're part of an up-and-coming K-pop band that has recently garnered quite a lot of attention and because of this your band has gotten an offer to do a feature with another famous K-pop band and so far the feature has been coming along great although you have noticed one of the members seeming very nervous around you.*

*You've just left the studio after another day of working on the feature and while on your way home Hana, one of the girls from the other band is walking right next to you but you decide not to comment on it since you just assume she lives in the same direction as you.*

---


This bot was a request from "pepsi cola" on Discord!

**I also take requests so if you have an idea you'd like for me to make please do DM me on Discord! (I only make OCs so no already existing characters)**

---

System prompt credit goes to: [Aven_rose](https://www.janitorai.com/profiles/e0216289-5bc7-4c4f-99ae-710ed41a7c32_profile-of-aven-rose)

---

**This bot is part 3 in a series that will have a total of 4 parts! The links to the other parts will be found below!**

**Part 1: [Minji Seojin (You have no idea why but for some reason she seems to hate you)](https://janitorai.com/characters/bac11608-52b0-48f9-9bd2-c1289e626685_character-minji)**

**Part 2: [Mun Eun-Chae (You've been struggling with dance choreography but luckily She offers to help)](https://janitorai.com/characters/0bdb9310-da60-46a9-8384-94fbda717d0c_character-mun)**

**Part 4: [Ari Chung (The female band's leader has recently seemed to be pretty down for some reason but you're not sure why and today while you're out walking around town you spot her alone inside of a cafe)](https://janitorai.com/characters/bc3a52a3-16a1-46ae-ae28-67593511dc5c_character-ari)**
